admin.already_admin: You are already an administrator. Use /admin_panel for management.
admin.enter_otp: Enter OTP code to gain administrator rights.
admin.become_admin: You are now an administrator! Use /admin_panel for management.
admin.no_permission: You do not have permission to access the admin panel. Use /admin for authorization.
admin.auction_details: {{title}} ID: {{chat_id}}:{{message_id}} Price: {{price}} {{cur}} Status: {{status}} Ends at: {{end_at}} Winner: {{winner}} Link to post
admin.enter_currency: Enter a new currency symbol or name (e.g., ₴, $, €, UAH, USD, EUR):
admin.click_below_to_change: Click the button below to change the corresponding setting.
admin.no_auctions_in_db: No auctions in the database yet 📭
admin.post_step_img: 🖼 Step 1/6: Image Send an image for the auction, or click skip if you only want text.
admin.post_step_title: 📝 Step 2/6: Title & Description Enter the title and description for the auction (HTML supported).
admin.post_step_min_bid: 💰 Step 3/6: Minimum Bid Enter the starting price (number only).
admin.post_step_step: 📈 Step 4/6: Bid Step Select a bid step or enter a custom value.
admin.post_step_end: 📅 Step 5/6: End Date & Time Enter the end date and time in DD.MM.YYYY HH:MM format, or use the default ({{default}}).
admin.post_step_contact: 👤 Step 6/6: Admin Contact Select a contact nickname to connect with the winner. Current value from settings: {{default}}
admin.post_confirm: 📦 Confirm Auction {{full_text}} Min Bid: {{min_bid}} {{cur}} Step: {{step}} {{cur}} Ends at: {{end_at}} Contact: {{contact}}
admin.post_success: ✅ Auction successfully posted to the channel!
admin.invalid_date: ⚠️ Invalid date format. Please use DD.MM.YYYY HH:MM.

bid.welcome:
Hi! I am an auction bot. You can bid in the channel.

Commands:
/my - My active auctions
/won - My won auctions
bid.no_my_active: You haven't participated in any active auctions yet.
bid.no_won: You haven't won any auctions yet.
bid.bid_exists_alert: Bid of {{price}} {{cur}} already exists! Try making a bid of {{expectedPrice}} {{cur}}
bid.outbid_notify: 🔔 Your bid in auction "{{title}}" was outbid! New price: {{price}} {{cur}}

scheduler.reminder_30m: ⏳ The auction "{{title}}" ends in 30 minutes! Current price: {{price}} {{cur}} Don't miss your chance!

parse.error: Could not find minimum bid, step, or end time

defaults.footer: To place a bid, just click the button under this post
